subject: Build Timer Screen
description: Create src/screens/TimerScreen.tsx as main timer interface. Create src/components/timer/TimerDisplay.tsx showing large formatted time (HH:MM:SS), updates every second, shows 'No active timer' when idle. Create src/components/timer/TimerControls.tsx with Start/Pause/Stop buttons, disabled states based on timer status. Create src/components/timer/CategorySelector.tsx as modal/dropdown for selecting category before starting timer, shows user's categories with colors AND types, allows 'No category' option. Integrate useRealtimeTimer hook for live updates. Show connection status indicator. Add quick notes input for when stopping timer. Responsive layout that works on phone and tablet.
result_summary:
Task was already completed by a previous worker session (commit 31c93dd). Verified all required components exist and meet task requirements:

1. **TimerScreen.tsx**: Main timer interface with:
   - Header with connection status indicator (connected/reconnecting/disconnected)
   - Timer display integration via TimerDisplay component
   - Category selection (readonly when timer active, editable when idle)
   - Quick notes input section shown when stopping timer
   - TimerControls for Start/Stop buttons
   - Responsive layout using SafeAreaView, KeyboardAvoidingView, ScrollView
   - Real-time sync via useRealtimeTimer hook
   - Platform-aware alerts (Alert.alert on native, alert() on web)

2. **TimerDisplay.tsx**: Shows large HH:MM:SS format (fontSizes.display + 16), updates every second via useTimerStore, shows 'No active timer' with dimmed 00:00:00 when idle, status text shows Running/Paused/No active timer

3. **TimerControls.tsx**: Start button (primary variant) when no timer, Stop button (danger variant) when active, loading and disabled states via isStarting/isStopping props, accessibility labels and hints

4. **CategorySelector.tsx**: Modal with user's categories including color swatches AND type badges, 'No category' option at top, FlatList for efficient rendering, selected state with checkmark, loading spinner while fetching categories

5. **QuickEntry.tsx**: Manual time entry component with category selector, date picker, duration input, notes field

6. **index.ts**: Barrel exports for all timer components

All components use theme tokens (colors, spacing, borderRadius, fontSizes), proper TypeScript typing, and follow the UI component patterns established in task-006. Contract was already registered as "Timer Screen Components".
